query:
-- Smile IT services with cost but no revenue
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C2441' AND monthlyCost > 0 AND monthlyRevenue = 0
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;

-- Check if any Xero billing items exist for Smile IT contact names
SELECT DISTINCT contactName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(lineAmount) as total
FROM billing_items
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Smile IT%' OR contactName LIKE '%SmileIT%' OR contactName LIKE '%Smile-IT%'
GROUP BY contactName;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute -- Smile IT services with cost but no revenue
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C2441' AND monthlyCost > 0 AND monthlyRevenue = 0
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;

-- Check if any Xero billing items exist for Smile IT contact names
SELECT DISTINCT contactName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(lineAmount) as total
FROM billing_items
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Smile IT%' OR contactName LIKE '%SmileIT%' OR contactName LIKE '%Smile-IT%'
GROUP BY contactName;
